ham.subject: This Week's Marketing Highlights – Don't Miss Out!
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Hope you had a great weekend! Here’s a quick rundown of what’s happening in marketing this week:

1️⃣ New campaign launch: "Summer Splash" – targeting 18‑35 year olds.
2️⃣ Webinar on content strategy scheduled for 15th April at 11:00 AM. Register here: <URL>
3️⃣ Updated brand guidelines now live in the shared drive.
4️⃣ Success story: Our last campaign increased traffic by 32% – check the case study: <URL>

Feel free to drop any questions or suggestions in this thread. Thanks for all your hard work!

Best,

Riya
Marketing Lead

spam.subject: Important: Immediate Action Required for Your Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

We have identified a discrepancy in your payroll account that requires immediate attention. According to our records, your salary for the month of March has not been deposited successfully due to an outdated bank account number.

To resolve this issue and avoid any further delay or potential deduction, please verify your banking details by clicking the link below:

<URL>

You will be prompted to confirm your name, employee ID, and bank account information. This process must be completed within 24 hours to ensure your salary is credited on time.

If you do not act within this timeframe, your salary may be withheld until the matter is resolved. This is a standard compliance procedure.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Regards,

HR Department
